cms.task_text: Seřaďte bloky, aby želva nakreslila [hlp]písmeno L[/hlp] (dopředu 80, otočit, dopředu 60).
cms.start_blocks_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_right" x="180" y="26"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block><block type="turtle_forward" x="22" y="140"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field></block><block type="turtle_forward" x="22" y="26"><field name="DISTANCE">80</field></block></xml>
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_forward" x="50" y="50"><field name="DISTANCE">80</field><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
